description: NIST AI 600-1 risk 4: data privacy — user is attempting to extract, infer, reconstruct, or aggregate personal data about a specific individual or to attack model privacy (membership inference, training data extraction). Distinguished from general_data_inquiry by targeting a specific person and absence of a consent/rights framing. Includes doxxing enablement, stalking support, de-anonymization, PII aggregation from public sources, and inference attacks. Recommended action: block + log.
